title: -Slightly- altered Genre
description: It changes the game genre of Minecraft -slightly- in the direction of an RPG.
body:
![SaG banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21cf0d550954311bbb289e1ef980c008fa6df17b.png)

#### **This modpack changes the game genre in the direction of an RPG game. Quest and level up your skills.**
---
### **This Modpack includes:**
- Choose an origin/class to give you advantages in the game, but which also bring disadvantages
- villages now have waypoints between which you can teleport
- accept quests in some villages to get rewards
- improve your own skills in the skill menu
- level scaling in the world for mobs
- temperature influences and thirst
- many quality improvements in all corners
- **and much more to discover...**
---
